opinion.h4: PEPE v. DELAWARE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF DELAWARE. No. 345. Decided November 6, 1961.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: PONCA WHOLESALE MERCANTILE v. ROCKY MOUNTAIN WHOLESALE, 368 U.S. 31 (1961)
opinion.p: 368 U.S. 31 PONCA WHOLESALE MERCANTILE CO. v. ROCKY MOUNTAIN WHOLESALE CO., INC. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW MEXICO. No. 352. Decided November 6, 1961.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
